meta.description: Curated outbreak pins from peer-reviewed summaries and public health reports. Verify counts at the cited source.

outbreaks.label: MV Hondius — multi-country Andes virus cluster
outbreaks.label_zh: MV Hondius — 多国安第斯病毒群聚事件
outbreaks.country: Multi-country (vessel: South Atlantic; medevac: S. Africa, Spain)
outbreaks.virus: PCR confirmed in 8 of 11 as of 15 May
outbreaks.transmission_note: Index cases (Dutch couple) had zoonotic exposure in South America pre-embarkation; subsequent limited person-to-person transmission aboard closed vessel. WHO DON599 (4 May 2026).

outbreaks.label: Four Corners HPS cluster
outbreaks.label_zh: 美国四角地区HPS群聚事件
outbreaks.transmission_note: Rodent-borne; no sustained person-to-person transmission documented for SNV in the U.S.
outbreaks.source_name: CDC / MMWR — recognition of HPS in southwestern U.S.

outbreaks.label: El Bolsón ANDV outbreak
outbreaks.label_zh: 阿根廷埃尔博尔松安第斯病毒疫情
outbreaks.transmission_note: Early evidence of person-to-person transmission in linked cases.
outbreaks.source_name: NEJM / peer literature on ANDV (background in NEJM 2020 outbreak report)

outbreaks.label: Epuyén ANDV outbreak
outbreaks.label_zh: 阿根廷埃普延安第斯病毒疫情
outbreaks.transmission_note: Person-to-person chains; median R 2.12 pre-control, 0.96 after control (NEJM).
outbreaks.source_name: New England Journal of Medicine — super-spreading investigation

outbreaks.label: Yosemite National Park HPS
outbreaks.label_zh: 美国约塞米蒂国家公园HPS事件
outbreaks.transmission_note: Exposure linked to park lodging (rodent reservoir).

outbreaks.label: PUUV / HFRS cluster (Baden-Württemberg)
outbreaks.label_zh: 德国巴登-符腾堡PUUV/HFRS群聚事件
outbreaks.source_name: Eurosurveillance — record HFRS year in Germany

outbreaks.label: Finland — endemic nephropathy (PUUV)
outbreaks.label_zh: 芬兰 — 普马拉病毒地方性肾病（PUUV）

outbreaks.label: Chile — ANDV / HPS (illustrative national focus)
outbreaks.label_zh: 智利 — 安第斯病毒/HPS（全国重点区域）
outbreaks.transmission_note: Country reports HPS; consult Chile Ministry of Health for current counts.

outbreaks.label: Paraguay — HPS cases (public reporting year)
outbreaks.label_zh: 巴拉圭 — HPS病例（公开报告年度）
outbreaks.transmission_note: Rodent-borne; counts from PAHO/WHO situational reporting vary by year.
outbreaks.source_name: PAHO — HPS in the Americas (verify year)

outbreaks.label: Brazil — HPS foci (illustrative)
outbreaks.label_zh: 巴西 — HPS疫情焦点（示意）
outbreaks.transmission_note: Zoonotic; consult PAHO country tables for annual totals.

r0_reference.andes_citation: Martinez et al., NEJM 2020 — median reproductive number before/after control in Epuyén outbreak.
r0_reference.sin_nombre_human_chains: Approximately 0 for sustained person-to-person transmission in U.S. surveillance context (dead-end zoonotic infections dominate).
r0_reference.sin_nombre_citation: CDC HPS — transmission from rodents; person-to-person spread not reported like respiratory viruses.
r0_reference.generation_note: Illustrative serial interval for person-to-person Andes chains; not a universal constant for all orthohantaviruses.
